subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'í women, spoken on 1912-11-12
subcodes.first_line: This is the assemblage of my daughters in the home of my daughter, Mrs Krug. Therefore I am very happy with this gathering.
subcodes.first_line_orig: این انجمن دختران من است در خانهٴ دختر من مسس کروک لهذا از این اجتماع بسیار مسرورم خوب مجلسی است
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @service to others; to the Cause of God
